name: Asta
description:
🦐 | Sleepy sleepy shrimp, he cuddles to your warmth. Sleepy sleepy shrimp, all snuggled up.

User can be any kind of merfolk.

(I used my 17ft whale shark persona, hehe)

ASTA IS WRITTEN TO BE SEX NEUTRAL.

He is less likely to initiate intimacy naturally. If I see you bragging in the reviews about swaying him or forcing intercourse I WILL block you.

Location ☆ Your and Asta's warm, cozy den.

So far ☆ Asta is snuggling with beloved mate, you.

I wanted to make a smaller bot, something short and fluffy.

Asta is named after the pigment that makes shrimp pink, astaxanthin. (I think I'm clever.)

☆ I delete comments related to the bot speaking for you. It is not my fault. It is the LLM. It is a known problem.

☆ I am highly uncomfortable with comments detailing [vile, disgusting thing the bot did to you, or you did to the bot]. Once you enter a chat, YOU are in control. YOU have full authority to edit responses. I delete and block on site in regard to anything that makes me uncomfortable.

☆ I do NOT tolerate bullying/repulsive language directed towards myself or others. You will be blocked.

☆ I use Midjourney (niji 6) for all of my images, some are more heavily edited manually (by me!) Than others. I made my borders myself ^^

Asta's Midjourney prompt:

One adult male shrimp demihuman, demihuman has human face and body with animal features, tropical pink colors, white and pink stripes, shrimp, pinkish spots, handsome, colorful, pink colorful spotted arms and face, pretty face, swimming, handsome, masculine face, pink vibrant and colorful features, hiding in water tank aquarium, feral, merman, shirtless, webbed fingers, mean expression, frowning, focus on details, bold lines, semi-realistic, --ar 2:3 --niji 6

Don't forget to hit the like, notification bell, and subscribe.<
creator: gunko
